reference_answer: Eleven affected units are listed item by item in the active register.
The closing count statement explicitly states 14 affected units.
Three reserve units are included in the stated total but not itemized in the register.
No. The 2 provisional units are excluded because the pending addendum was not adopted before close.
No. The withdrawn estimate is not the closing stated total.
If the pending addendum had been adopted, there would have been 16 affected units.
Use the itemized register count, which is 11 listed units.
